mechanisms: Fermentable oligosaccharides selectively increase beneficial gut bacteria and SCFA production.

a FODMAP so people with IBS or FODMAP sensitivity or SIBO should avoid or use only under supervision since it can worsen bloating or cramping or gas or diarrhea at typical prebiotic doses
